gaps.why_it_matters: The protocol says full validation but does not explain why full validation is required.
gaps.reviewer_question: Please provide the rationale for the selected validation scope.

gaps.gap_description: Acceptance criteria lack rationale or source
gaps.why_it_matters: Criteria are listed but no rationale or source is provided.
gaps.reviewer_question: Please provide the basis for each acceptance criterion.
gaps.expected_element: Criteria are linked to purpose, method type, and data source

gaps.gap_description: SST is generic or not linked to method performance
gaps.why_it_matters: SST criteria are generic and not linked to critical assay performance.
gaps.reviewer_question: Please explain how each SST monitors critical method performance.

gaps.gap_description: Failed-run or repeat rule is unclear
gaps.why_it_matters: No failed-run, repeat-run, or data exclusion rule is provided.
gaps.reviewer_question: Please provide predefined deviation and repeat testing rules.
gaps.expected_element: Invalid run, repeat, retest, and exclusion rules are defined

human_review_statement: This gap assessment is AI-assisted and advisory only. It does not approve a protocol, report, method, validation conclusion, or regulatory strategy. Qualified human review is required before any real use.
